extraction.one_line_summary: CHAVES Esteban attacked the INEOS train on final climb to Port Ainé, winning by 7 seconds after KÄMNA forced INEOS to chase all day.
tactical_patterns: KÄMNA infiltrating break only 1:30 down forced INEOS to chase entire day, wasting domestique firepower before final climb.
INEOS deployed full train on final climb despite 50+ second GC lead, revealing tactical conservatism when protecting multiple podium positions.
CHAVES attacked with 500m remaining when INEOS prioritized protecting multiple GC spots over stage win, exposing team hierarchy constraints.
ALMEIDA dropped in final 500m under pace on Port Ainé suggests altitude/sustained gradients expose weakness despite earlier GC position.

rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: First win since 2019 Giro, climbing better than two years, attacked successfully against INEOS train protection
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: Tactical nuisance forcing INEOS hand despite no stage win, shows understanding of GC gap leverage for break infiltration
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Controlled stage comfortably but chose not to attack for stage win, prioritizing GC security with 50+ second buffer
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Rode tempo when CARAPAZ mechanicals threatened, moved into podium position with bonus seconds, strong final climb
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: Second on GC, part of dominant INEOS trident controlling race at will on mountain stages
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: Mechanical on final climb but recovered quickly to maintain GC position within INEOS train
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Failed to show Tirreno form where he won Prati di Tivo, unable to challenge INEOS dominance
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: Dropped in final 500m when pace intensified, suggests weakness on sustained altitude climbs
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: World TT champion climbing at domestique level, brought back KÄMNA after 4km on Port Ainé
rider_signals.ROWE Luke: positive: Policed break formation and contributed to valley chase before final climb, classic super-domestique work
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Dropped halfway up penultimate climb, altitude issues cited from earlier racing
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: neutral: Mentioned as stage 5 target but no signal from stage 4 commentary
